SELECT ?filer_name (COUNT(?filing) AS ?filing_count) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k> WHERE {
  ?filer <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filer> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_entity_type> "operating" .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/has_filing> ?filing .
  ?filing <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/type/Filing> .
  ?filer <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-sec-edgar-10k/pred/filer_name> ?filer_name .
} GROUP BY ?filer_name
ORDER BY DESC(?filing_count)

-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Filer: 500 rows (from Filer.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Filer" (
  "filer_cik" INTEGER,
  "filer_name" TEXT,
  "filer_ticker" TEXT,
  "filer_sic_code" INTEGER,
  "filer_entity_type" TEXT,
  "filer_ein" INTEGER,
  "filer_category" TEXT,
  "filer_state_of_incorporation" TEXT,
  "filer_fiscal_year_end" INTEGER,
  "filer_exchange" TEXT,
  "filer_phone" TEXT
);

-- Table Filing: 511 rows (from Filing.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Filing" (
  "filing_id" TEXT,
  "filing_filer_cik" INTEGER,
  "filing_accession_number" TEXT,
  "filing_form_type" TEXT,
  "filing_date" TEXT,

  "filing_primary_doc_desc" TEXT
);

-- Table Exhibit: 701 rows (from Exhibit.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Exhibit" (
  "exhibit_id" TEXT,
  "exhibit_filing_id" TEXT,

  "exhibit_type" TEXT,

-- Table SICCode: 175 rows (from SICCode.csv)
CREATE TABLE "SICCode" (
  "sic_code" INTEGER,
  "sic_description" TEXT,
  "sic_division" TEXT
);
